instructionalDaysDescription: calendar summary based on the published Randolph County School System calendar
seoTitle: Randolph County School System Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View the Randolph County School System 2026-2027 calendar including first day of school, holidays, teacher workdays, breaks, early dismissal dates, PDF, and calendar download options.
calendarNotes: Randolph County School System starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 24, 2026 and ends on June 9, 2027 with a 2-hour early dismissal. Student no-school periods include Thanksgiving holidays November 26-27, winter annual leave and holidays December 21-January 1, and annual leave March 29-April 1. The calendar also lists teacher workdays, report cards, interim reports, quarter dates, early releases, and inclement-weather make-up notes.

customSections.label: 2026-2027 Randolph County School Calendar Overview
customSections.content: The Randolph County School System 2026-2027 calendar gives families a single place to review the school-year dates that affect attendance, transportation, childcare, travel, and academic planning. The traditional school year begins on August 24, 2026 and ends on June 9, 2027 with a 2-hour early dismissal. Summer break begins after the final student day on June 9, 2027. The calendar also includes teacher workdays, professional development dates, annual leave periods, holidays, early dismissals, quarter endings, semester transitions, report cards, interim reports, and inclement-weather make-up notes.

groups.label: This RCSS calendar page includes
items: First day and last student day for the 2026-2027 school year.
Thanksgiving holidays, winter annual leave, spring annual leave, and major no-school dates.
Teacher workdays, early dismissal dates, grading-period milestones, PDF access, and calendar download options.

customSections.label: How We Verify RCSS Calendar Dates
customSections.content: MySchoolDates checks Randolph County School System calendar dates against the publicly available official RCSS calendar source. We compare key dates such as the first day of school, final student day, annual leave periods, holidays, teacher workdays, early dismissals, and make-up notes before publishing the page. The downloadable calendar file is generated from the checked records used on this page, but the official RCSS calendar remains the source of record for last-minute changes, weather closures, and school-specific announcements.

customSections.label: Calendar Update History
customSections.content: This page is maintained as an independent calendar reference for the Randolph County School System 2026-2027 school year. Update notes help families understand when the page was last checked and what changed during the review process.

rows: Initial verified publication based on the approved RCSS 2026-2027 school calendar source.
Revisions, emergency schedule changes, weather make-up decisions, or updated district PDFs will be reviewed against official RCSS announcements.

customSections.label: Important Randolph County School System Dates for Parents
customSections.content: These are the RCSS dates families most often use for planning. The table adds context for why each date matters instead of only repeating the date from the official calendar.

rows: Students return after summer break and regular school-year transportation begins.
A short holiday period that affects travel, childcare, and work schedules.
The longest mid-year break window for family travel and childcare planning.
The main spring vacation planning period before fourth quarter begins.
The final student day includes a 2-hour early dismissal, so afternoon pickup plans may change.

customSections.label: RCSS Teacher Workdays 2026-2027
customSections.content: Randolph County School System teacher workdays are important no-school planning dates for families. These dates can affect childcare, transportation, appointments, and work schedules, even though they are primarily scheduled for staff planning, professional development, grading, or calendar transition work.

rows: Final staff preparation day before students return on August 24.
Student no-school planning date before the end of first quarter.
Student no-school date during the second quarter.
Extends the Thanksgiving planning window before the district holidays.
Semester transition period before students begin the second semester on January 21.
Follows Spring Annual Leave before fourth quarter begins.
Post-year staff workdays after the final student day.

customSections.label: Randolph County School System Teacher Workdays Explained
customSections.content: Teacher workdays are scheduled days when staff complete planning, professional development, grading, or administrative work. Randolph County School System lists teacher workdays throughout the 2026-2027 calendar, including dates before school starts, around Thanksgiving, between semesters, after Spring Annual Leave, and after the final student day. For family planning, these dates should generally be treated as student no-school dates unless RCSS announces a make-up change or a school-specific exception.

groups.label: Parent planning notes
items: Teacher workdays can affect childcare, transportation, and after-school plans.
Workdays near holidays may extend the practical break period for students.
Inclement-weather make-up decisions can change how some listed workdays are used.

customSections.label: Planning Around the RCSS School Calendar
customSections.content: Families in Randolph County, Asheboro, and nearby Piedmont Triad communities often use the RCSS calendar to plan vacations, childcare, appointments, transportation, and academic checkpoints. Before scheduling travel or time off work, review the first day of school, Thanksgiving holidays, winter annual leave, spring annual leave, teacher workdays, early dismissals, and the last student day.

groups.label: Before making plans
items: Confirm whether a listed date is a holiday, annual leave day, teacher workday, or early dismissal.
Add 2-hour early dismissal dates separately because pickup and bus schedules may change.
Check official RCSS announcements for weather closures, make-up days, and school-specific changes.

customSections.label: Randolph County School System Calendar Changes: 2025-2026 vs 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families comparing RCSS school years can review how the first day, final student day, winter break, and spring annual leave shift from the previous calendar to the 2026-2027 calendar.

customSections.label: 2026-2027 RCSS Calendar Changes & Updates
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 RCSS calendar reflects the scheduled dates currently published by Randolph County School System. Families comparing this year with the previous school year should note that the first day moves to August 24, 2026, the final student day moves to June 9, 2027, and Spring Annual Leave shifts to March 29-April 1, 2027. Weather closures, emergency cancellations, revised early dismissal schedules, and district calendar updates are announced separately by RCSS, so families should verify changes with the official district source before changing travel, childcare, or transportation plans.

groups.label: Updates families should watch for
items: Weather closures and inclement-weather make-up decisions.
Emergency cancellations or remote learning announcements.
Revised early dismissal schedules or school-specific changes.
Updated PDF calendars posted by Randolph County School System.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Randolph County School System start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Randolph County School System Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The main spring annual leave period runs Monday, March 29 through Thursday, April 1, 2027, followed by a workday on April 2.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Randolph County School System in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last student day is Wednesday, June 9, 2027, with a 2-hour early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Randolph County School System have school tomorrow?
calendarFaqs.a: This page shows planned calendar dates, not real-time closures. Families should check Randolph County School System announcements for weather closures, emergency changes, or same-day schedule updates.

calendarFaqs.q: Are Randolph County School System teacher workdays no-school days for students?
calendarFaqs.a: Teacher workdays are generally student no-school planning dates unless RCSS announces a make-up change or a school-specific exception.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Randolph County School System release students for summer in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Students are released for summer after the last student day on Wednesday, June 9, 2027. The calendar notes a 2-hour early dismissal that day.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Randolph County School System calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the PDF link on this page or the official Randolph County School System calendar page to view the published 2026-2027 school calendar PDF.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in the Randolph County School System 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The calendar covers approximately 180 instructional days based on the published RCSS schedule. Families should confirm official attendance totals with Randolph County School System.

calendarFaqs.q: Does the Randolph County School System calendar include early dismissal days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 calendar includes early dismissal dates, including the last student day on June 9, 2027 with a 2-hour early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: How does RCSS handle school closings and make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The calendar includes inclement-weather make-up notes, but weather closures and emergency schedule changes are announced separately by Randolph County School System.
